**MAT 200C Final Report | Felix Yuan | 2026 Winter**

***Eyefloaters***  
[https://editor.p5js.org/houseofballoonsyzy/sketches/tYBDEFYEN](https://editor.p5js.org/houseofballoonsyzy/sketches/tYBDEFYEN)   
[https://github.com/HouseOfBalloonsYZY/EyeFloaters](https://github.com/HouseOfBalloonsYZY/EyeFloaters)   
![][image1]![][image2]

**Abstract**  
An interactive self evolving system that replicates the experience of seeing the eyefloaters under the sun and zone out. User can draw or select shapes in the incubator, and select them as parents for the next generation of eye floater shapes, and also release eye floaters in the eyeball view (called the ocean view), where the released eye floaters mutate, mate, and die out according to the population, forming a dynamically stable system.

**Prior work and reference:**

**Technology:**  
[P5.js](http://P5.js), JavaScript, GLSL

**Attribution:**

Technical:

In genotype — phenotype transform, use Discrete Fourier Transformation (DFT)+ resampling with steps to uniformly describe the phenotype from any closed shape in a state invariable way and avoiding the user’s input speed to interfere with the state invariant DFT. So that compared to using Elliptic Fourier Descriptor, this way it would not require setting a fixed amount of points, and adapts smaller shapes better.

Aesthetic:

Visuals inspired by furtiger aero style.  
Combining self-emergence, evolving and interactivity with both hard interaction (user shape drawing input, select shapes they like as parents) and soft interaction (make new generation with shapes as parents, releasing shapes to ocean and have them reproducing randomly)

**Link to code:**   
[https://editor.p5js.org/houseofballoonsyzy/sketches/tYBDEFYEN](https://editor.p5js.org/houseofballoonsyzy/sketches/tYBDEFYEN) 

**Future plans:**  
Have the fitness function changed from manual human selection only to RL like fitness for the shapes to reach some goal.

**Conclusions and discussions:**  
This is an experiment on self emergence and interactivity, along with digitizing and visualizing mundane events that tend to be ignored. The most interesting part I later discovered is the impossible dichotomy in such systems for a lot of features in order to capture and remake the real life scenario, including: 

1. The eye floaters should bounce to each other smoothly in desired condition, but that way it is not elastic enough for the eye floaters and loses energy by the wall and becomes stuck at the corner. (Controversy between realistic level & system stability)  
2. Same issue with a smooth birth of eye floaters and the new born kicking the parents away and breaks the serenity feature of the visuals  
3. The dynamic population stability should be even ideally, but as user input is essentially an adding population operation, it needs to be prone to slightly dying out overall.  
4. Between accuracy in catching user input and the overall smooth coherent shape generated from randomness \-\> harmonic count

And overall, it concludes that we are getting users out of the whole real life eye floater system that we also try to capture, but since the system is self emergent itself, adding arbitrary interruption like interactivity inherently breaks the balance. Philosophically I will posit this as taking out a seemingly self decisive part from a whole balanced dynamic system is like trying to be god as a human figure, which will essentially break the whole balance of human and that material world.
